package.name: m80106_lib
package.description:
Header-only library for Unitree GO-M8010-6 motor control over RS-485.
Bundles the Unitree SDK shared object (libUnitreeMotorSDK_M80106_*.so) for x86_64 and aarch64. No external SDK download is required — the package is fully self-contained.
Provides four user-facing headers under m80106_lib/: motor_types.hpp — constants, enums, unit-conversion helpers motor_bus.hpp — RS-485 adapter discovery by USB PID:VID motor_driver.hpp — typed SerialPort wrapper + scanMotors() control_modes.hpp — scalable control-mode abstraction (PD, PI, impedance, direct torque, CRTP extension base)
